page: Microsoft Azure EC64as_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance belonging to the ECASv5 server family. Powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture, this instance features 64 dedicated virtual CPUs and 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. The underlying virtualization is managed by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached volumes. It is Premium Storage capable, allowing users to provision high-performance persistent disks to handle storage-intensive operations. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are bundled with this server type.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the EC64as_v5 offers a high-density memory configuration relative to its compute resources, making it a viable option for workloads that require substantial memory footprints without the overhead of local physical disks. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance. This server is suited for memory-intensive workloads such as large relational databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise resource planning applications, and data analytics pipelines.
description: Microsoft Azure EC64as_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine from the ECASv5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and 512.0 GB of system memory, establishing an 8.0 GB per core ratio. This instance does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, allowing high-performance external block storage attachments. It does not bundle complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for resource-dense environments, the EC64as_v5 provides qualitative cost efficiency for memory-heavy operations by decoupling compute and memory from local disk storage. This configuration is suited for large-scale databases, in-memory data stores, and enterprise applications requiring substantial RAM.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC64as_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 512 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring sixty-four dedicated cores and half a terabyte of system RAM for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD x86_64 processor
512.0 GB of system memory providing an 8.0 GB per core ratio
Premium Storage capable for high-performance external disk attachment
No local storage included, decoupling compute from persistent data
Optimized for large databases, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications
